description: Human-agnostic, algorithmic complexity-based benchmark to assess frontier AI models and AGI/ASI claims

methodology.basis: Compressed representation analysis and algorithmic information dynamics
methodology.key_concept: Measures ability to discover generative mechanisms rather than statistical correlations
methodology.collapse_prevention: Explicitly designed to detect αt→0 collapse regime

findings.leading_llms: Inconsistent and often divergent with newer versions sometimes less capable than older versions
findings.hybrid_neuro_symbolic: Shows promise in escaping distributional collapse
findings.pure_statistical: Converges to degenerate fixed points under self-reference

notes: Per ArXiv 2601.05280v2: Purely self-referential density matching induces contraction toward degenerate stationary distribution
Neurosymbolic integration grounded in algorithmic information theory provides path beyond collapse
Benchmark measures transition from distributional fit to mechanistic coherence
